meaning: n.(罗马民间传说中的)皮西厄斯(与其友Damon为生死之交)
examples: If Pythias does not come back in time, it will not be his fault.
The two strangers helped each other during the earthquake and later became Damon and Pythias.
He at last agreed to let Pythias go, and gave orders that the young man Damon should be shut up in prison.
